use std::ffi::CString;

fn open_path(path: &str) -> Result<i32, String> {
    let c_path = CString::new(path).map_err(|e| format!("invalid path: {}", e))?;
    let fd = unsafe { libc::open(c_path.as_ptr(), libc::O_RDONLY) };
    if fd < 0 {
        Err(format!("open failed: {}", std::io::Error::last_os_error()))
    } else {
        Ok(fd)
    }
}
